---
title: "baylands data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
```{r}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(osmdata)
library(tidyverse)
library(googlesheets4)
library(janitor)
library(ggthemes)
```

```{r}
water_data.csv = data.frame(
  Sample,Latitude,Longitude,Free Chlorine (ppm),Nitrate NO3- (ppm),Nitrite NO2-(ppm),General Hardness(ppm),Total Alkalinity(ppm),pH,Sodium Chloride NaCl(ppm),Ammonia NitrogenH6N2(ppm)
Sample 1,37.435429,-122.106671,0,0–15,0–0.5,435,180–240,>8.4,0,0–0.25
Sample 2,37.436344,-122.105193,0,250,1–5,425,>240,>8.4,0,0.5
Sample 3a,37.440336,-122.112990,0,50,0,425,>240,>8.4,0,0
Sample 3b,,,0,150,2,425,240,>8.4,0,0–0.5
Sample 3c,,,0,25,0,425,180,>8.4,0,0–0.5
Tap Water (Control),,,0,25–50,1,125–250,240,>8.4,0–2000,0
)
```



```{r}
read_sheet("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NCE0y1CySTw83xqdO-bYBNrs1ew5zJLd5kafm3FWWPI/edit?usp=sharing") %>% 
  clean_names()
```
